hooks.command: eval "$(${SHELL:-/bin/zsh} -ilc 'echo export PATH=\"$PATH\"' 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null; git diff HEAD --quiet 2>/dev/null; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -eq 1 ]; then tmp=$(mktemp /tmp/ask-llm-XXXXXX); trap 'rm -f "$tmp"' EXIT HUP INT TERM; git diff HEAD -- ':!*.env*' ':!*.key' ':!*.pem' ':!*credentials*' ':!*secret*' ':!*.lock' | head -c 51200 > "$tmp"; gemini -p "Briefly review these session changes for any critical issues. Be concise — 3 bullets max. @$tmp" 2>/dev/null & pid=$!; (sleep 60 && kill $pid 2>/dev/null) & guard=$!; wait $pid 2>/dev/null; kill $guard 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); echo "$input" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; eval "$(${SHELL:-/bin/zsh} -ilc 'echo export PATH=\"$PATH\"' 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null; staged=$(git diff --cached -- ':!*.env*' ':!*.key' ':!*.pem' ':!*credentials*' ':!*secret*' ':!*.lock' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$staged" ] && exit 0; tmp=$(mktemp /tmp/ask-llm-XXXXXX); trap 'rm -f "$tmp"' EXIT HUP INT TERM; echo "$staged" | head -c 51200 > "$tmp"; gemini -p "Review these staged changes about to be committed. Flag only critical issues that should block the commit. Be concise — 3 bullets max. @$tmp" 2>/dev/null & pid=$!; (sleep 60 && kill $pid 2>/dev/null) & guard=$!; wait $pid 2>/dev/null; kill $guard 2>/dev/null; exit 0
